title: Inbox Zero - Action Items
description: Action items extracted from emails by the Inbox Zero Commander pipeline. Created by the Action Agent on first run.

Title.description: Verb-first action description (max 80 chars). Examples: 'Review project timeline', 'Send invoice to client', 'Schedule team sync'.

Description.description: Full context of what needs to be done, including relevant details from the source email.

Owner.description: Who should complete this task. Inferred from email content using owner inference rules: explicit assignment > 'you/your' > direct request > cc'd party > default to user.

Deadline.description: ISO date deadline or empty. Parsed from explicit dates, relative references ('by Friday'), and urgency language ('ASAP' = today + 1 business day).

Priority.description: Priority score 1-5, inherited from the email's triage priority. 5 = critical/urgent, 1 = low/backlog.

Source Email.description: Gmail message link for traceability back to the original email.

Email From.description: Sender email address of the source email.

Email Subject.description: Original subject line of the source email.

notes: The Action Agent searches for this database by name before creating it. Duplicate detection uses verb+noun matching within a 14-day window.
